**Which governance pillar does this address?**
- [ ] Trust (TrustScore, AIPassport)
- [ ] Safety (Bias, Hallucination, Guardrails)
- [ ] Security (RedTeam, adversarial robustness)
- [ ] Privacy (Federated learning, DP)
- [ ] Compliance (NIST, EU AI Act, ISO 42001)
- [ ] Governance (Dashboard, Audit Trail, Cost Intelligence)

**Problem statement**
What AI governance problem does this solve?

**Proposed solution**
Describe the feature and how it fits the ResponsibleAI governance pipeline.

**Who benefits?**
What type of organization or role would use this?
(e.g. AI safety team at a bank, compliance officer at a hospital, ML engineer at a startup)

**Alternatives considered**
Are there existing tools that partially address this?

**Additional context**
